blocks.title: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION ON REVERSIBILITY
blocks.content:
14 APPLICATION UNIT

This paragraph gives information on the applied product and how the reference flowand table with impacts relate to different

applications.

STAR 75 window systems have only 1 application.

2 2

Results presented in this EPD are for 1 mof a window system with the size < 2.3 m.

Different dimensions are possible, and window systems are made to measure, depending on the requirements of the

customer and limited by the glass supplier.

Tocalculate the environmental impact of a window system with a different surface area:

2

- Results must be multiplied by the surface area (in m) of the window system in question.

2

For example, if window system is 1.5 m, results presented in this EPD have to be multiplied by 1.5.

Theratio between application and the referenceflow in the EPD is, therefore1.
